title: BS 8007 Crack Width Calculator
description: Calculate the crack width of an RC section for applied loading.

wc_max.description: Max Allowable Crack Width (wcmax). Symbol: w_{cmax}. Units: mm. Maximum Allowable Crack Width

e_s.description: Modulus of Elasticity (Es). Symbol: E_{s}. Units: GPa

m_r.description: Modular Ratio (mr). Symbol: m_{r}. Ratio of modulus of elasticity of steel to modulus of elasticity of concrete in working stress method.

M.description: Service Moment (M). Symbol: M. Units: kN.m. Absolute value of bending moment.

T.description: Service Tension (T). Symbol: T. Units: kN. Tension force in the member.

W.description: Member Width (W). Symbol: W. Units: mm

D.description: Member Depth (D). Symbol: D. Units: mm

c_c.description: Clear Cover to Concrete (Cc). Symbol: C_{c}. Units: mm

d_t.description: Diameter of Tension Reinforcement (dt). Symbol: d_{t}. Units: mm

s_t.description: Spacing of Tension Reinforcement (Ts). Symbol: T_{s}. Units: mm

d_c.description: Diameter of Compression Reinforcement (dc). Symbol: d_{c}. Units: mm

s_c.description: Spacing of Compression Reinforcement (Cs). Symbol: C_{s}. Units: mm. Spacing of Compression Reinforcement

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
